name: Banana Nut Bread (Zel Ford)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 358°F.
2. Grease a 9 x 5 x 3-inch loaf pan.
3. Sift flour, baking powder, and baking soda together thoroughly.
4. Mix shortening with sugar using an electric mixer on medium speed until light and fluffy (about 4 minutes).
5. Add eggs to the mixture and beat until very light and fluffy.
6. Gradually add the sifted flour mixture and chopped nuts to the egg mixture, alternating with the mashed bananas, beating on low speed until smooth.
7. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
8. Bake for 1 hour or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
9. Allow cooling in the pan for 10 minutes before removing it and letting it cool overnight before slicing.
